macos: Upload your legally obtained US ROM with Upload SFC, or place it as zelda3.sfc in the selected repo folder.
After venv activation, press the install dependencies button
Install a C compiler and SDL2 development files with your OS package manager before building.
Press the Build assets button to extract assets and compile zelda3_assets.dat.
Press Build project to build the executable, or press re-build project to clean and rebuild it.
When it finishes, go back to the home menu to Play or Randomize.
windows: Upload your legally obtained US ROM with Upload SFC, or place it as zelda3.sfc in the selected repo folder.
Make sure MSBuild is installed, or use the Manual install button beside any missing dependency check.
After venv activation, press the install dependencies button
Use Visual Studio Build Tools with Desktop development with C++ or the TCC package route before building.
Press Build assets to extract assets and compile zelda3_assets.dat.
Press Build project (MSBuild) to build the executable, or Rebuild project (MSBuild) to run the MSBuild rebuild target.
If you use the TCC route, press Build project (TCC).
When it finishes, go back to the home menu to Play or Randomize.
linux: Upload your legally obtained US ROM with Upload SFC, or place it as zelda3.sfc in the selected repo folder.
Press the Create venv button. On Debian/Ubuntu, install venv support first if Python asks for python3-venv.
After venv activation, press the install dependencies button
Make sure the C compiler check is OK, then install SDL2 development files before building. On apt-based Linux/Unix systems, use `sudo apt-get install libsdl2-dev`.
Press the Build assets button to extract assets and compile zelda3_assets.dat.
Press Build project to build the executable, or press re-build project to clean and rebuild it.
When it finishes, go back to the home menu to Play or Randomize.
linux_packaged: Upload your legally obtained US ROM with Upload SFC, or place it as zelda3.sfc in the selected repo folder.
Press the Create venv button. On Debian/Ubuntu, install venv support first if Python asks for python3-venv.
After venv activation, press the install dependencies button
Press the Build assets button to extract assets and compile zelda3_assets.dat.
Press Build project to download the matching executable/AppImage from the selected repo release.
